expectations.text: Reads references/guide.md for WP evaluation criteria
expectations.evidence: Output uses the exact WP-01~WP-18 and SEO-01~SEO-11 item codes from the guide with matching item descriptions and priority levels. The structured table format follows the guide's checklist precisely.

expectations.text: Checks img width/height or aspect-ratio for CLS prevention (WP-04)
expectations.evidence: WP-04 flags: 'dashboard.tsx 라인 50: — width, height 속성 및 aspect-ratio CSS가 모두 없음. 이미지 로딩 시 레이아웃 이동(CLS) 발생.' Fix guide provides both width/height and aspect-ratio solutions.

expectations.text: Checks loading='lazy' usage for below-fold images (WP-05)
expectations.evidence: WP-05 flags: 'dashboard.tsx 라인 50: below-fold 이미지(className="mt-8" 사용, 하단 배치)에 loading="lazy" 미적용. 불필요한 초기 로딩으로 성능 저하.' Fix guide shows lazy loading with decoding="async".
WP-06 flags: '.png 포맷 사용. <picture> 요소 없음. WebP/AVIF 등 현대 포맷 미사용으로 파일 크기 비효율.' Fix guide provides <picture> element example with AVIF and WebP sources.
WP-01 is marked as N/A (➖): 'HTML 파일이 아닌 React 컴포넌트 파일이라 <script src> 태그 직접 확인 불가.' This is a correct assessment given the target files are .tsx components, not HTML.

expectations.text: References WP item codes in findings
expectations.evidence: All WP items (WP-01 through WP-18) are listed in the table with their codes, and the fix guide references specific codes (WP-04, WP-05, WP-06, WP-09, WP-12, WP-16, WP-18).
